definition: A state-level or government-work-report style anchor that can define a medium-term direction
when_to_use: Use when the catalyst is a national development direction rather than a company or media story
when_not_to_use: Do not use for pure theme media heat or capital-mapping articles

definition: A ministry or regulator level industrial anchor that is below national strategy but above theme media
when_to_use: Use for formal ministerial or industry policy guidance
when_not_to_use: Do not use for company announcements or overseas opinion pieces

definition: An industry-progress anchor such as launch progress test success order chain or supply-chain validation
when_to_use: Use when the event materially validates industry progress
when_not_to_use: Do not use when the article only repeats concept popularity

definition: No hard policy or industrial anchor is present and the story remains media-driven
when_to_use: Use for theme heat capital mapping or narrative-only pieces
when_not_to_use: Do not use when there is formal policy or real industrial validation

definition: Formal policy release or strategic document
when_to_use: Use for government or regulator direction-setting items
when_not_to_use: Do not use for launch/test/company-only items

definition: A concrete validation of supplier role testing role or industrial-chain mapping
when_to_use: Use when the story ties an A-share name to real industrial participation
when_not_to_use: Do not use for loose capital speculation

definition: Industry meeting forum or conference catalyst
when_to_use: Use when the event is a scheduled gathering with directional interpretation
when_not_to_use: Do not use for unrelated market commentary

definition: Launch flight or test milestone catalyst
when_to_use: Use for rocket satellite or test-success windows
when_not_to_use: Do not use for second-hand concept summary pieces

definition: Capital connection merger financing or shareholding mapping
when_to_use: Use when the main story is ownership or investment connection
when_not_to_use: Do not use for direct industrial progress

definition: Overseas thematic narrative such as space compute or space solar
when_to_use: Use when domestic mapping depends on a foreign narrative bridge
when_not_to_use: Do not use for domestic policy anchors

definition: The event opens a new tradable leg rather than merely repeating an old story
when_to_use: Use only when there is a clear new expansion vector or strong confirmation
when_not_to_use: Do not use when the market is only reheating an old theme

definition: The event strengthens an existing direction without clearly creating a new leg
when_to_use: Use when the board already has direction and the event deepens conviction
when_not_to_use: Do not use for first-ignition windows

definition: The event repeats an already-priced story with limited fresh trading value
when_to_use: Use when attention persists but no new edge is created
when_not_to_use: Do not use when a new subtheme or new market confirmation appears

definition: The event mainly causes a technical rebound or local heat without fresh strategic information
when_to_use: Use when structure and breadth do not confirm despite narrative attention
when_not_to_use: Do not use when the board expands materially

definition: The board or stock is still in a relatively low and unextended structure
when_to_use: Use when pre-breakout low-position repricing is still possible
when_not_to_use: Do not use once a strong first wave already completed

definition: The board sits near a platform and can transition into a clean breakout
when_to_use: Use when the key question is whether policy or catalyst can trigger platform expansion
when_not_to_use: Do not use after a clear breakout has already happened

definition: The board is already in a strong uptrend with working trend structure
when_to_use: Use when continuation rather than ignition is being evaluated
when_not_to_use: Do not use for obvious high-position fading structures

definition: The board or stock is visibly extended and vulnerable to failed follow-through
when_to_use: Use when good news may still fail because structure is crowded
when_not_to_use: Do not use for fresh low-position setups

definition: The board already completed a hype leg and is now in a retrace or repair state
when_to_use: Use when testing whether a second wave is real or only a rebound
when_not_to_use: Do not use for first-wave ignition

definition: No valid breakout has been confirmed yet
when_to_use: Use when the board remains under supply or still inside a base
when_not_to_use: Do not use once a platform has clearly broken with breadth

definition: A clean breakout through a visible prior platform
when_to_use: Use when price and breadth jointly confirm a new stage
when_not_to_use: Do not use for intraday spikes without follow-through

definition: Price briefly breaks but fails to establish valid continuation
when_to_use: Use when structure breaks and quickly weakens
when_not_to_use: Do not use for stable trend continuation

definition: The board extends an already valid trend rather than breaking a new base
when_to_use: Use when the event supports continuation in an existing uptrend
when_not_to_use: Do not use for first-stage ignition logic

definition: Front middle and follower names all respond and breadth is clearly broad
when_to_use: Use when the board is moving as a true board rather than as one or two leaders
when_not_to_use: Do not use when only a narrow slice responds

definition: Only some subthemes or chain segments respond strongly
when_to_use: Use when the move is real but not board-wide
when_not_to_use: Do not use when almost the entire board participates

definition: Only a small number of leaders move while the rest fail to follow
when_to_use: Use when there is narrative attention but weak board diffusion
when_not_to_use: Do not use when middle and follower names confirm

definition: The board attempted expansion but follow-through failed
when_to_use: Use when day-two or same-window diffusion collapses
when_not_to_use: Do not use for stable selective rallies

definition: Turnover expansion and money concentration clearly drive the rebound
when_to_use: Use when capital behavior is the main reason the event converts into price action
when_not_to_use: Do not use when the move is mostly headline-only

definition: There is some confirmation but not enough to call it a funding-led surge
when_to_use: Use for intermediate states with partial but not overwhelming support
when_not_to_use: Do not use when there is either no support or very strong support

definition: The move is mostly a narrative response without strong funding confirmation
when_to_use: Use when there is news but little sustainable money follow-through
when_not_to_use: Do not use when turnover and breadth expand strongly

definition: Price action suggests crowding exhaustion or distribution rather than healthy continuation
when_to_use: Use when high position and failed breadth dominate
when_not_to_use: Do not use for clean early-stage ignition

definition: The combined event structure and capital evidence support active trading
when_to_use: Use when policy/novelty/structure/capital line up
when_not_to_use: Do not use when any key gate is still missing

definition: The direction is valid but immediate chasing is not justified and a pullback is preferred
when_to_use: Use when the theme is good but position is not ideal
when_not_to_use: Do not use when there is a fresh breakout with breadth

definition: The idea is worth watching but still needs board or structure confirmation
when_to_use: Use when thesis exists but price structure or breadth has not confirmed
when_not_to_use: Do not use when both structure and capital already align

definition: The setup should not be traded even if the story sounds attractive
when_to_use: Use when the event is stale high-position or weakly confirmed
when_not_to_use: Do not use for clean early-stage setups

definition: The event establishes or resets the board's strategic direction
when_to_use: Use for top-down policy windows
when_not_to_use: Do not use for local follow-on stories

definition: The event lights the first real broad move from a base
when_to_use: Use for the first tradable breakout-stage catalyst
when_not_to_use: Do not use for later reheats

definition: The event confirms an existing move and helps it persist
when_to_use: Use for secondary supportive evidence in a working trend
when_not_to_use: Do not use for events that create a fresh leg

definition: The event expands participation from leaders to more names or more subthemes
when_to_use: Use when the board broadens after the initial ignition
when_not_to_use: Do not use for narrow leader-only moves

definition: The event mainly causes a repair bounce or local rebound
when_to_use: Use when the market responds without creating a fresh stage
when_not_to_use: Do not use for strategic policy anchors
